description: CompositionLavender t-shirt made of cotton and lycra, with short sleeves and full graphic print on the front, replete with sweat protectionWash careHand wash or machine washThis is the ultimate tank top for women. The feminine shade of lavender and subtle graphic print of flowers and butterflies across the front make this short-sleeved tee from adidas a perfect wear to the Sports club or gym. The sweat protection formula ensures you stay dry while you ship yourself into shape. You can pair this with tights or slim Fit jeans for casual occasions.Model's statistics1. The model wears size M in t-shirts 2. Height-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-25"
